investigation_summary: Moderate among megacaps: palm-oil deforestation links despite policy (RAN). Charmin virgin-boreal fiber F grade NRDC Issue with Tissue. Tide Pod child-poisoning jury (2012) and CPSC friction over packaging reforms. PFAS detections in some SKUs. historic triclosan use until FDA 2016 ban.

profile.tax_summary: FY2023 ~18.8% effective vs 21% statutory. Ireland / Singapore / Luxembourg IP structures — typical MNE optimization without fraud finding here.
profile.legal_summary: 2012 jury on laundry-pod child access — redesign path. 2020s PFAS class actions. Sustainability labeling suits 2023. Ohio >$100M incentives (Good Jobs First).
profile.labor_summary: Developed-market operations quiet. Palm oil sourcing — RAN contested adequacy. China-market animal testing where legally mandated.
profile.environmental_summary: Palm-linked deforestation risk. PFAS persistence. Charmin virgin pulp critique. CDP A-.
profile.political_summary: Moderate consumer-goods lobbying; sugar / chemical regulation via trade groups.
profile.product_health: Tide pods poisoning surge 2012–2019 — design changes. Triclosan phased post-ban. Fragrance opacity typical. PFAS third-party tests.
profile.executive_summary: No executive criminal matters in this volume.
